utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not believe this ! This is like the worst night ever !

emotion_cause.span: 3_This is like the worst night ever !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You know Monica you had a minor setback in your relationship with Chandler . Big deal ! It is only Chandler . I am so sorry .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: This is crazy ! I mean , it is such a stupid argument . I do not even wanna see Richard again .

emotion_cause.span: 5_This is crazy ! I mean , it is such a stupid argument .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: He is probably up in your room !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Tell him that you are sorry and that you love him .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You know what ? You are right Phoebe . You are right . Thank you !

emotion_cause.span: 10_You are right Phoebe . You are right .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Sure ! Yeah ! Las Vegas , number one !

utterances.speaker: The Croupier
utterances.text: Comin out . Place your bet . Dice are out . Double or nothin ! Pay the front line !
